purpose: Replace the blanket human-adjudication dependency with deterministic machine gates while keeping publication fail closed.

adjudication_lanes.third_engine_text_consensus: Run PP-StructureV3 as a third independent engine. Publish only exact spans supported by two engines and matching protected fields.
adjudication_lanes.table_structure_consensus: Run PP-StructureV3 table recognition. Release a cell only when text, row-column coordinates, numeric fields, and source-page bindings agree.
adjudication_lanes.blank_raster_consensus: Use raster ink density and connected-component analysis plus two zero-text OCR witnesses. Blank pages emit no quotable text.
adjudication_lanes.conflict_fail_closed: Conflicting characters or structures remain omitted until a machine consensus lane passes.
